problem id: 0ba9af93
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHL(4)

examples:
  11001111 -> 11111001
  11100100 -> 11011100
  10000010 -> 01110000
  11100000 -> 00011100
  01110100 -> 11001110
  01010100 -> 11001010
  11110110 -> 11111110
  11111000 -> 10011111
  01100111 -> 11111100

query: 10110111
predicted answer: 11110110
